home.title: Configuration
home.subtitle: Set up the Telegram notification and CRM parameters, then proceed to the skin analysis form.
home.form_desc: Configure Telegram bots, CRM IDs, and language before starting.
home.chat_ids_help: Enter one or more Telegram chat IDs separated by commas.
home.bot_index_help: Which Telegram bot to use (from the bots table).

footer.disclaimer: AI estimate — not medical advice. Body composition is shown as a range with confidence. Consult a clinician for diagnosis.

landing.hero_subtitle: An AI body and nutrition coach that reads twelve signals from a single scan — composition, posture, hydration, recovery — and turns them into a plan you can actually follow.
landing.stats_1_label: Of users complete their first scan in under 6 minutes.
landing.stats_2_label: Average increase in plan adherence vs. tracker apps.
landing.stats_3_label: Body, nutrition & lifestyle signals analysed per scan.
landing.stats_4_label: Languages — full localisation across English, ES, DE, FR, JP.
landing.services_subtitle: Every scan covers the same six domains. From body composition to recovery, we map what's working, what's drifting, and what needs your attention this week.
landing.service_1_body: Visible fat distribution, muscle balance, symmetry — read as ranges with confidence intervals.
landing.service_2_body: Forward-head angle, shoulder symmetry, hip alignment from front and side.
landing.service_3_body: Region-by-region tone, with targeted mobility and lift suggestions for the gaps.
landing.service_4_body: Skin tone, fascial tension, eye signals — turned into a daily water target.
landing.service_5_body: Pattern from logged sleep + cortisol cues, feeding into deload weeks and bedtimes.
landing.service_6_body: Energy, mood, digestion patterns logged across meals to refine your weekly plate.
landing.service_plan_body: Once your scan completes, we generate today's plate, this week's training, and your supplement stack. Re-scan in four weeks — we adjust against what actually moved.
landing.how_step1_text: Three photos — front, side, back. A live silhouette overlay tells you when you're framed.
landing.how_step2_text: Twelve metrics, six domains. Composition, posture, recovery, hydration, nutrition signals.
landing.how_step3_text: Today's plate, this week's training, your supplement stack — built from your actual scan.
landing.how_step4_text: Log meals, mark workouts done. Re-scan in 4 weeks. Watch the trend lines bend.
landing.testimonials_subtitle: We've run more than 95,000 scans in the last quarter. Here's what a handful of users told us — verbatim, in their own words.
landing.testimonial_1_text: The team didn't just build my plan — they helped me see why I'd been plateauing for a year. The hotspots on the body canvas were what finally made it click.
landing.testimonial_2_text: I've used four trackers. This is the first one that told me which lever to pull — and was right.
landing.testimonial_3_text: My re-scan after six weeks showed a posture +5 and waist −2 cm. Plan adherence was the difference.
landing.testimonial_4_text: The hydration insight alone paid for the year. I had no idea I was running dry on training days.
landing.testimonial_5_text: The supplement stack is opinionated — and accurate. Three items, all tied to something they read.
landing.cta_body: Three photos, a short questionnaire, and you'll have your composition read, today's plate, and this week's training before your coffee gets cold.
landing.footer_tagline: Building healthier bodies through science, design, and AI.

scan.title: Skin Analysis
scan.subtitle: Take a clear photo of your face for the most accurate results
scan.upload_prompt: Drag & drop your photo here, or click to browse
scan.tip4: Ensure your full face is visible
scan.no_photo: Please capture or upload a photo first.
scan.rail_sub: Eight short steps and one photo. Takes about three minutes — your routine is built from this.
scan.camera_help_title: Hold steady — we auto-capture the sharpest frame.
scan.camera_help_body: Make sure your full face is visible inside the dashed oval, with even lighting on both sides.
scan.upload_help_body: Your image is transmitted over HTTPS and stored securely for your report. Only you can access it.

step1.title: Basic Information
step1.subtitle: Tell us about yourself
step1.display_sub: Tell us about yourself — we use this to tailor your report and reach you with results.
step1.email_help: We email your full report and routine here. Never used for marketing.
step1.name: First Name
step1.consent_text: I agree that my personal data (including my photo) will be processed by AI to generate a skin analysis. Results will be stored and shared with my coach.

step2.title: Main Goal
step2.display_sub: Pick up to three concerns. The first answer ranks your product order; the rest fine-tune it.
step2.concerns_label: What concerns you most about your skin right now? (up to 3)
step2.priority_label: If you could improve just one thing about your skin, what would it be?
step2.zones_label: Where would you like to see the most change?

step3.title: How You Perceive Your Skin
step3.display_sub: How you describe your skin matters — we cross-reference it with what the camera sees later.
step3.skin_type_label: How would you normally describe your skin?
step3.feel_general_label: How does your skin feel most of the time?
step3.feel_end_day_label: How does your skin feel at the end of the day?

step4.title: Current Routine
step4.display_sub: We won't ask you to throw anything away. We'll plug into what's already working.
step4.frequency_label: Do you usually have a facial routine?
step4.products_label: What products do you currently use?
step4.essential_label: What product never misses from your routine?
step4.missing_label: What product do you think you're missing or don't know which to use?
step4.supplements_label: Do you take any supplements for your skin? (e.g., collagen)

step5.title: Sensitivity & Tolerance
step5.display_sub: How forgiving your skin is shapes which actives we recommend, and at what concentration.
step5.reaction_label: Does your skin react easily to some products?
step5.signs_label: Have you noticed any of these signs lately?

step6.title: Habits That Affect Your Skin
step6.display_sub: Sleep, sun, and water are bigger inputs than most products. We weigh them.
step6.makeupFrequency_label: How often do you wear makeup?
step6.sleepHours_label: How many hours do you normally sleep?
step6.stressImpact_label: Do you feel stress is affecting your skin?
step6.waterIntake_label: Do you drink enough water daily?

step7.title: Past Experience
step7.display_sub: We learn from what didn't work as much as from what did.
step7.history_label: Have you tried any treatment or routine to improve your skin before?

history.yes_no_results: Yes, but I didn't see results
history.tried_many_nothing_works: I've tried many things and nothing works

step7.frustrations_label: What frustrates you most about the products you've used?

frustrations.dont_know_how_to_combine: I don't know how to combine them

step8.title: Your Goals
step8.display_sub: How much routine, and at what level of investment — so the recommendations actually fit.
step8.looking_for_label: What are you looking for right now?
step8.recommendation_label: Would you like us to recommend a routine tailored to your skin and goal?
step8.budget_label: What level of investment is comfortable for you to care for your skin each month?

budget.medium: Medium (cleanser, serum + eye cream or tension cream ~ €150/170 approx)

step9.title: Upload Your Photo
step9.subtitle: Take a clear photo of your face or upload an existing one for the AI analysis.
step9.display_sub: Take a clear photo of your face or upload an existing one for the AI analysis.

scan.access_message: To use the skin scanner, you need a personalised access link from your coach. Please contact your coach to get started.
scan.complete_message: Your skin analysis has been processed successfully. Your coach will share the detailed results with you shortly. Please contact your coach to receive your personalised report and product recommendations.
scan.complete_hint: Your coach has been notified and will reach out with your results.

results.title: Your Skin Analysis
results.form_data_desc: All the information you provided during your skin scan.
results.metrics_lede: Each metric is scored 0–100 against your demographic cohort. Tap a card for the full description.
results.insights_lede: Four lenses on the same data — what's working, what's stressed, what your habits are doing to it, and where to aim next.
results.tips_lede: Small adjustments, sequenced. The routine is built around your concerns — order, frequency, and timing all included.
results.products_lede: Personalised for your skin analysis — picks ranked by how directly they target your lowest-scoring metrics.
results.footnote: This tool is intended only for cosmetic awareness purposes. Skin scores may vary based on applied makeup. Results are not a substitute for professional dermatological advice.

metrics_desc.oily_skin: This measures the amount of excess oil or sebum on the skin. A balanced score suggests the skin is producing oil at a normal level without being overly greasy.
metrics_desc.uneven_skin_tone: This refers to irregularities in skin color, such as redness, dull areas, or patches of discoloration. A better score means the complexion looks more even and uniform.
metrics_desc.eye_wrinkles: This evaluates the presence of wrinkles around the eye area. A higher score indicates smoother skin and fewer visible lines in this delicate area.
metrics_desc.crows_feet: This measures the fine lines that appear at the outer corners of the eyes. A stronger result means these lines are less noticeable.
metrics_desc.radiance: This shows how bright, fresh, and healthy the skin looks. A high score means the skin appears luminous and full of vitality.
metrics_desc.firmness: This measures how tight, elastic, and resilient the skin is. A good score suggests the skin has strong support and less visible sagging.
metrics_desc.hydration: This indicates the level of moisture in the skin. Well-hydrated skin tends to look plumper, healthier, and more comfortable.
metrics_desc.dark_spots: This evaluates the visibility of pigmentation marks or areas of discoloration. A higher score means dark spots are minimal or less visible.
metrics_desc.smoothness: This measures how soft and even the surface of the skin feels and looks. A high score suggests refined, polished-looking skin.
metrics_desc.fine_lines_wrinkles: This assesses the overall appearance of expression lines and wrinkles across the face. A better score means they are less visible.
metrics_desc.texture: This refers to the overall condition and consistency of the skin's surface. A very high score suggests the skin looks refined, even, and well-balanced.
metrics_desc.dark_circles: This measures the appearance of darkness under the eyes. A high score means the under-eye area looks brighter and less tired.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what personal data we collect, how we process it, who we share it with, and what rights you have under applicable data protection laws including the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.data_collected: We collect the following personal data when you use our skin analysis service: your name, email address, phone number, date of birth, country, city, questionnaire responses about your skin, a facial photograph, and the AI-generated skin analysis results.
privacy.how_we_process: Your facial photograph is sent securely over HTTPS to our AI provider (OpenAI) for analysis. The photo is also stored via Cloudinary for your report. The AI generates a skin assessment with scores, insights, and product recommendations. All data is stored in our secure database to provide your report and allow your coach to review results with you.
privacy.lawful_basis: We process your personal data based on your explicit consent, which you provide by checking the consent box before submitting the skin analysis form. You may withdraw your consent at any time by contacting us.
privacy.third_parties: We use the following third-party services to process your data: OpenAI (AI skin analysis), Cloudinary (image storage), Vercel (application hosting), and Neon (database hosting). Each provider processes data in accordance with their own privacy policies and applicable data protection standards.
privacy.data_retention: Your personal data and analysis results are retained for as long as necessary to provide our services. You may request deletion of your data at any time. Upon receiving a valid deletion request, we will erase your data within 30 days.
privacy.your_rights: Under the GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the right to: access your personal data, rectify inaccurate data, erase your data (right to be forgotten), restrict processing, data portability, object to processing, and withdraw consent at any time. Exercising these rights will not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal.
privacy.how_to_contact: To exercise any of your rights, or if you have questions about this policy, please contact us at: privacy@beautyandglow.ai. We will respond to your request within 30 days.
privacy.cookies: This application uses only essential cookies required for the service to function (e.g., language preference). We do not use tracking cookies, advertising cookies, or analytics cookies.
privacy.changes: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. When we make changes, we will update the 'Last updated' date at the top of this page.

common.timeout: Analysis took too long. Please try again.
